subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! By Thy might and Thy sovereignty, verily Thy sorrow hath grieved me, and that which hath befallen Thee from the oppressors among Thy creation. Thou art He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی و عزتک و سلطانک قد احزننی حزنک و ما ورد علیک من طغاه خلقک انت الذی
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @prayer for spiritual recognition, @suffering and imprisonment, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for detachment
